_field_notes.block_id: Stable identifier for the candidate block A in this pair.
_field_notes.block_size: Positive integer block size; keep fixed for the active stratum unless starting a separate run.
_field_notes.candidate_slice_band: Fixed candidate slice band for the active stratum, for example top_L.
_field_notes.context_id: Stable identifier for the held context L.
_field_notes.delta_logloss: Numeric log-loss improvement: logloss_without_A minus logloss_with_A, using the fixed model and fixed scoring set.
_field_notes.delta_utility: Numeric utility marginal: utility_with_A minus utility_without_A, averaged over the stated replicates.
_field_notes.materialization_policy: Fixed materialization policy used for every row in this active stratum.
_field_notes.metric: Fixed metric contract for this calibration run.
_field_notes.model_tier: Fixed model tier used for the log-loss measurement.
_field_notes.notes: Operator provenance, scoring method, replicate details, and any exclusions.
_field_notes.replicate_count: Positive integer count of independent repeats or scoring replicates represented by this row.
_field_notes.source: Use operator_provided only after every placeholder has been replaced with real operator measurements.
_field_notes.stratum_id: One active stratum identifier; keep identical across all rows in this one-stratum file.
_field_notes.task_family: Task family for the active stratum.

_template_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. Replace every OPERATOR_FILL_* value before validation. Do not copy fixture rows into operator data.
TEMPLATE ONLY. Keep stratum_id, task_family, model_tier, materialization_policy, metric, block_size, and candidate_slice_band fixed for this one-stratum run.
TEMPLATE ONLY. delta_utility must be utility_with_A minus utility_without_A for the same fixed context and scoring rule.
TEMPLATE ONLY. delta_logloss must be logloss_without_A minus logloss_with_A so positive values mean lower log loss with A.
TEMPLATE ONLY. The default config requires at least six distinct rows and effective sample size of at least six.
TEMPLATE ONLY. Run dry validation first; dry validation writes no artifacts and makes no paper-evidence claim.
